title: Under local vote semantics, inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public for stale docs or prompt/check text that still claims assist defaults to claude or that codex+claude+glm is the default baseline after our Claude-free code change. Focus on README.md, docs/gha24-mainframe-flow.md, docs...
summary_text: Minimum files to update based on stale default-claim text are: 1. [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:200) - `assist既定は claude（co-orchestrator 常時有効）` is still documenting claude as default assist. 2. [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:159) - `FUGUE_REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO ... codex+claude+glm の成功参加を必須化` still documents a `codex+claude+glm` default. 3. [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md:227) - Same `FUGUE_REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO=true` note states default baseline requires `codex+claude+glm`. 4. [docs/gha24-mainframe-flow.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/gha24-mainframe-flow.md:10) - Flow text says `Assist defaults to claude` explicitly, while surrounding language describes co-orchestrator behavior as codex-normalized. 5. [docs/agents/execution-lanes.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/execution-lanes.md:22) - Claims `FUGUE_REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO=true` enforces `codex + claude + glm` baseline before execution approval. 6. [/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:1278) - Runtime default still resolves `REQUIRE_BASELINE_TRIO` to `'true'`, so this is coupled to the “default baseline trio” assumption. No other `prompt/check` text in the targeted fileset was found to still hard-claim these stale defaults (notably `CODEX.md` and the checked check scripts did not contain explicit `assist=claude`/`codex+claude+glm` default assertions).
